title: Bridge Essay: Can Interoception Improve the Pragmatic Search for Biomarkers in Psychiatry?

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body-energy — interoception, heart-brain axis, breathing entrainment, spiritus.

**Can Interoception Improve the Pragmatic Search for Biomarkers in Psychiatry?**. Front Psychiatry.. PMID: 27504098. DOI: 10.3389/fpsyt.2016.00121. Disrupted interoception is aprominent feature of the diagnostic classification of several psychiatric disorders. However, progress in understanding the interoceptive basis of these disorders has been incremental, and the application of interoception in clinical treatment is currently limited to panic disorder.
